items.title: [react-reconciler] Fix typos in comments
items.body:
## Summary

Fix typos in comments within the react-reconciler package:
reconcilation → reconciliation
passsed → passed
muliple → multiple
commmit → commit
deletiong → deletion
becuase → because
udpates → updates

## How did you test this change?

This change only fixes typos in code comments. No functional changes were made, so no additional testing is required.
items.author: yujiteshima

items.title: test_runner: omit ignored uncovered branches in lcov
items.body:
## Summary
- omit uncovered BRDA entries in lcov when branch maps to ignored `node:coverage` lines
- compute BRF/BRH from emitted BRDA entries so lcov totals stay consistent
- add a regression fixture/test for ignored-branch behavior in lcov reporter

## Test plan
- not run in this environment (missing `out/Release/node`)
- run: `python3 tools/test.py test/parallel/test-runner-coverage.js`
items.author: ace-tk
